title: Software Engineer - Doc Management & EDI X12 Translation
description: Description & Requirements Maximus is currently seeking a Software Engineer . In this role, you will provide expertise in the areas of managed file transfer and EDI X12 translations. In addition, they must configure, support and maintain environments and procedures for all supported applications. This is a remote position.
